GOOD FRUIT. GOOD MOOD. GOOD LIFE.

FRESH JUICES, SMOOTHIES & COLD PRESS.

Freshly pressed, purely delicious juices, smoothies, fruit pots, sweet treats and premium protein shakes. No online ordering — just browse the menu and visit us in-store.

FRESH

OUR STORY

MADE WITH LOVE.

Hoots Fruits brings together fresh juices, smoothies, cold press drinks, fruit pots, sweet treats and protein shakes in a bright tropical style.

Located inside Don Taco on Uxbridge Road, the idea is simple: fresh ingredients, natural flavour and good vibes only.
